meaning: adv....得令人着急,...到令人着急的程度
examples: The branch was tantalizingly out of reach.
Now that objective is no longer tantalizingly out of reach.
Programming in Scala is tantalizingly familiar and different at the same time.
Even more tantalizingly, it might also help treat people who have already been infected.
That's why Clinton couldn't reach for the get-out-of-jail-free card dangled so tantalizingly by Hatch.
